tasks.title: Akshay's Gym Day Plan
tasks.summary: Strength-focused gym session with balanced nutrition for maintenance

days.diet: Breakfast: Eggs, Lunch: Chicken with rice, Dinner: Fish, Snack: Curd or whey
days.exercise: Strength training: Squats 4x8, Bench press 4x8, Deadlifts 3x5. Zone 2 cardio: 20min treadmill. Mobility: 10min dynamic stretches
days.task: Track protein intake (117g), hydrate well, focus on form during lifts

tasks.title: 7-Day Gym Plan for Beginners
tasks.summary: A general gym plan focusing on full-body strength and conditioning. Adjust weights based on comfort.

days.diet: High protein, moderate carbs (e.g., chicken, rice, veggies)
days.exercise: Chest & Triceps: Bench press 3x10, Push-ups 3x12, Tricep dips 3x10

days.diet: Balanced macros (e.g., salmon, sweet potato, greens)
days.exercise: Back & Biceps: Pull-ups 3x8, Lat pulldown 3x10, Bicep curls 3x12

days.diet: High fiber, lean protein (e.g., turkey, quinoa, broccoli)
Carbs pre-workout (e.g., oatmeal, banana, peanut butter)
days.exercise: Shoulders & Abs: Overhead press 3x10, Lateral raises 3x12, Plank 3x30sec

days.diet: Protein-rich recovery (e.g., Greek yogurt, berries, nuts)
Healthy fats focus (e.g., avocado, eggs, spinach)
days.exercise: Cardio & Core: Treadmill 20min, Russian twists 3x15, Leg raises 3x12

tasks.title: 7-Day Running Plan for Fat Loss
tasks.summary: A balanced running and diet plan for fat loss with low activity level.

days.diet: Breakfast: Oatmeal with nuts. Lunch: Lentil soup with veggies. Dinner: Tofu stir-fry.
days.exercise: Run 3km at moderate pace. Stretch post-run.
days.task: Hydrate well and track running distance.

days.diet: Breakfast: Greek yogurt with honey. Lunch: Chickpea salad. Dinner: Grilled paneer with quinoa.
days.exercise: Rest day. Light walking for 30 mins.
days.task: Focus on protein intake for recovery.

days.diet: Breakfast: Smoothie with spinach and banana. Lunch: Brown rice with dal. Dinner: Stir-fried veggies with tofu.
days.exercise: Run 4km at moderate pace. Include intervals.

days.diet: Breakfast: Whole grain toast with peanut butter. Lunch: Vegetable curry with roti. Dinner: Lentil soup with salad.
Breakfast: Scrambled eggs with veggies. Lunch: Quinoa salad with beans. Dinner: Grilled vegetables with hummus.
days.exercise: Run 5km at steady pace. Cool down stretches.

days.diet: Breakfast: Chia pudding with berries. Lunch: Spinach and cheese wrap. Dinner: Stir-fried tofu with brown rice.
days.exercise: Rest day. Light jog or walk.
days.task: Recover and prepare for next run.

days.diet: Breakfast: Oatmeal with flaxseeds. Lunch: Grilled vegetable sandwich. Dinner: Lentil stew with whole grain bread.
days.exercise: Run 6km at comfortable pace. Stretch post-run.
days.task: Review weekly progress and adjust plan.
